title: Alejandro Cordero | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd, PL
content:
## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Alejandro Cordero Rothstein is an immigration attorney at Colombo & Hurd. He is admitted to practice law in the State of California, before the U.S. District Courts for the Southern and Central Districts of California, and the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit.
Mr. Cordero has represented hundreds of individuals before the immigration courts, the Board of Immigration Appeals, federal circuit courts, U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services as well as other government agencies. He is experienced in business immigration, family-based immigration, and removal defense.
Prior to becoming an attorney in the United States, Alejandro Cordero worked as a lawyer in many law firms in San Jose, Costa Rica, and Shanghai, China, where he specialized in international law. His international background enriches his practice, allowing him to approach cases with a distinctive perspective.
Mr. Cordero holds a Master of Laws degree from the University of California at Berkeley, and a Master of International Laws degree from the Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. He obtained his Juris Doctor and Bachelor of Laws degree in Costa Rica. He speaks English and Spanish.
During his free time, he enjoys practicing Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, and Muay Thai, and spending time with his family at the beach.
